chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.42 of 2018 Niaz Yousuf Versus Jehantab Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection/reply at “A” 2. For hearing of CMA 1141/18 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For hearing of CMA 1143/18 Dated: 21.12.2023 None present for the appellant. Ms. Uzma Zahid for respondent. -.-.- Appellant and his counsel are not regular and punctual in appearance and at least since last two dates continuously they failed to appear and today is the third date when appellant and his counsel are called absent. There is no intimation either. Instant First Appeal is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge
